turn_log.label: tangent_git
turn_log.response_preview: Squash merges are generally preferred for feature branches to keep the main branch history clean and linear, while merge commits preserve the full history of a feature's development. The choice depends on whether you prioritize a tidy history (squash) or detailed audit trails (merge commits).
